conversation.user: I'm behind on my physics lectures. 8 lectures behind, each about 50 minutes. Midterm is in 2 weeks and the lectures are the main study material. I can do 2 hours a day.

expectedAI.reason: 연습문제 유무에 따라 Plan 2 생성 여부 및 시간 배분 전략이 달라짐
mustDiagnose: 50min lecture × 2.0× multiplier = ~100min effective per lecture → 1 lecture/day max within 120min budget

conversation.user: Yeah, there are practice problems at the end of each lecture. About 5-10 per lecture.

expectedAI.diagnosis: 8 lectures × 100min(2.0× multiplier) = 800min lecture + 60 problems × 4min = 240min practice → total ~1040min needed vs 14days × 120min = 1680min available → tight but workable with interleaving
expectedAI.strategy: 1 lecture/day + immediate 5 practice problems (Day 1-8). Day 9-14: full review + remaining problems + past exam practice. Interleaved: each day = current lecture + review of previous lecture problems.
expectedAI.honestAssessment: 1 lecture/day is the maximum pace. 2 lectures/day is physically impossible (200min > 120min budget). Day 9-14 review window is critical.

alternatives.label: 리뷰 축소
alternatives.change: Day 9-14 리뷰 → Day 9-11만 (3일 집중 리뷰), Day 12-14 시험 시뮬레이션

alternatives.label: 문제 우선 전략
alternatives.change: 강의 중 derivation 부분만 집중(강의당 70min) + 문제 풀이 시간 확대(50min/day)

mustIdentify: behind on lectures → structured catch-up needed
diagnosis.mustReflectInPlan: dailyTarget = 1 lecture/day, interleaved with practice problems

emotion.toneExpected: constraint-accepting; validate 'behind' feeling briefly then pivot to achievable plan
